rows.description: Implement the logarithmic exchange-field relation with declared units and domains.

Implement Rabi chevrons under frequency and voltage detuning.

Create a strict material and apparatus transfer firewall.
Implement an eight-state constrained three-site occupancy model.
Implement on-site energy, inter-site capacitive coupling, negligible direct hopping, and tip-position gating.
Solve non-equilibrium populations with a Pauli master equation.
Calculate current, differential conductance, total charge, and site occupancy.
Classify transitions as net-charge change or internal redistribution.
Explore symmetry, chirality, orbital-shape, and tip-position effects.
Detect negative differential conductance caused by population trapping.
Create an interpretation firewall for spatial ring and flower patterns.
Implement a honeycomb tight-binding baseline with Dirac points and M-point saddle points.
Implement lattice-expansion or hopping-reduction sweeps and quantify bandwidth narrowing.
Calculate density of states and extended saddle-point sensitivity.
Implement a controlled C6-to-C2 hopping perturbation and nematic observable.
Generate QPI-inspired geometric response proxies without claiming electronic equivalence.
Search resonator lattices for mode clustering, saddle points, and degeneracy splitting.
Design matched sixfold and twofold perturbation controls.
Create a transfer map from electronic lattice concepts to mechanical/electrical metamaterial questions.
Implement a generic problem-component filtration metadata scheme.
